editions.label: Business Development
editions.audience_description: BD managers and capture teams tracking contract opportunities, awards, and procurement activity
editions.analysis_instructions: Prioritise contract awards, solicitations, RFPs, and source selection decisions. Flag dollar values and performance periods. Note any sole-source justifications, set-aside status, or protest activity that could create an opening or risk.

editions.label: Policy & Regulatory
editions.audience_description: Government relations, compliance, and export-control teams tracking regulatory and legislative developments
editions.analysis_instructions: Prioritise NDAA provisions, DFARS/FAR rule changes, export-control actions (EAR, ITAR), Congressional budget markups, and DoD strategy documents. Note effective dates and comment deadlines.

editions.label: Executive Brief
editions.audience_description: Senior leadership seeking a strategic view of the week's most significant developments
editions.analysis_instructions: Surface only the highest-signal items: major program decisions, significant funding changes, geopolitical developments with direct industrial impact, and emerging competitive threats or opportunities. Skip routine administrative notices.

sources.name: Federal Register – Dept. of the Air Force

deep_analysis.instruction: Produce a concise but substantive briefing for a defense/aerospace business and policy audience. Stay grounded in the item; flag uncertainty rather than speculating.

sections.label: Background
sections.instruction: Two to three sentences situating this development: the program, contract, or policy thread it belongs to and what preceded it.

sections.label: Key stakeholders
sections.instruction: The agencies, primes, subcontractors, congressional actors, or allied governments with a material interest. Name them only if supported by the item.

sections.label: Scenarios to watch
sections.instruction: Two or three plausible ways this could develop over the next 6–18 months, each phrased as a short conditional.

sections.label: Recommended actions
sections.instruction: Concrete next steps a BD, capture, or policy team should consider this week.
